summary: Standard procedure for cold startup of AFBC boiler from ambient to full load
key_steps: 1. Pre-start checks (air/fuel/water) 2. Purge furnace 3. Light oil burner ignition 4. Bed heating to 650°C 5. Coal feeding initiation 6. Load ramp to MCR
safety_precautions: Ensure all personnel clear of furnace area. Verify explosion vent integrity. Monitor CO levels continuously during purge.
tools_required: Flame scanner | Combustion analyzer | IR pyrometer

summary: Sequence and timing for soot blowing to maintain heat transfer surfaces
key_steps: 1. Verify steam pressure >8 bar 2. Open drain valves 3. Activate retractable blowers top-to-bottom 4. Monitor flue gas temp differential 5. Log cleaning effectiveness
safety_precautions: Never operate with personnel on boiler platform. Check lance condition before operation.

summary: Immediate response procedure when tube leak is confirmed or suspected
key_steps: 1. Trip fuel feed immediately 2. Maintain ID fan for cooling 3. Isolate affected section 4. Controlled cooldown 5. Drain and inspect 6. Notify service team
safety_precautions: Full PPE mandatory. Hot work permit required for any repair. Confirm zero pressure before entry.
tools_required: IR camera | UT thickness gauge | PPE kit

summary: Routine checks for safe and efficient thermic fluid heater operation
key_steps: 1. Check fluid level in expansion tank 2. Verify circulation pump pressure 3. Record inlet/outlet temperatures 4. Check stack temperature 5. Inspect for leaks 6. Record fuel consumption
safety_precautions: Monitor for fluid vapour near heater. Ensure fire extinguisher accessible.
tools_required: Digital thermometer | Pressure gauge | Leak detector

summary: Periodic testing of thermic fluid properties to prevent degradation
key_steps: 1. Sample collection from live circuit 2. Flash point test 3. Viscosity measurement 4. Carbon residue analysis 5. Compare with OEM limits 6. Plan partial/full replacement
safety_precautions: Handle hot fluid with protective gloves. Sample from designated port only.
tools_required: Flash point tester | Viscometer | Sample bottles

summary: Optimization of combustion parameters for maximum efficiency
key_steps: 1. Measure O2 and CO in flue gas 2. Adjust air damper for target O2 (3-4%) 3. Verify flame stability 4. Record stack temperature 5. Calculate efficiency 6. Document settings
safety_precautions: No combustion adjustment during startup phase. Ensure stable load before tuning.
tools_required: Flue gas analyzer | Anemometer | Combustion calculator

summary: Procedure for WHRB startup synchronized with upstream process
key_steps: 1. Verify upstream process gas availability 2. Pre-start safety checks 3. Open gas dampers gradually 4. Monitor drum level and pressure 5. Steam admission to header 6. Load stabilization
safety_precautions: Confirm gas composition before admission. Emergency bypass must be functional.
tools_required: Gas analyzer | Drum level indicator | Safety interlocks check

summary: Operating procedure for limestone slurry preparation and recirculation
key_steps: 1. Prepare limestone slurry to 25% concentration 2. Start recirculation pumps 3. Monitor pH in absorber (5.5-6.0) 4. Adjust limestone feed rate 5. Monitor SO2 at stack 6. Manage gypsum discharge
safety_precautions: Slurry is abrasive — wear protective equipment near pumps. Monitor pump vibration.
tools_required: pH meter | Slurry density meter | Flow meter

summary: Cleaning and inspection of mist eliminator blades and wash system
key_steps: 1. Initiate wash cycle 2. Inspect nozzle spray patterns 3. Check blade condition for scaling/deformation 4. Clear blocked nozzles 5. Verify pressure drop across ME 6. Record findings
safety_precautions: Confined space entry procedures apply. Ensure wash water isolation before blade inspection.
tools_required: Pressure differential gauge | Inspection mirror | Nozzle cleaning tools

summary: Procedure for checking and restoring vacuum in absorption chiller
key_steps: 1. Record current vacuum level 2. Helium leak test on shells 3. Check purge unit operation 4. Inspect sight glasses for non-condensables 5. Run evacuation pump 6. Verify design vacuum restored
safety_precautions: Lithium bromide solution is corrosive — full PPE. Never open system to atmosphere.
tools_required: Vacuum gauge | Helium leak detector | Evacuation pump

sop_title: Confined Space Entry for Equipment Inspection
summary: Safety procedure for entering boiler drums furnaces and vessels
key_steps: 1. Obtain confined space permit 2. Atmosphere testing (O2/LEL/toxics) 3. Rescue plan in place 4. Continuous ventilation 5. Buddy system mandatory 6. Communication check every 15 min
safety_precautions: Minimum 19.5% O2 before entry. Rescue team on standby. Emergency extraction harness worn.
tools_required: 4-gas detector | Ventilation blower | Communication radio | Rescue tripod

summary: Structured approach to root cause analysis for recurring equipment issues
key_steps: 1. Define problem clearly 2. Ask Why (Level 1) 3. Ask Why (Level 2) 4. Ask Why (Level 3) 5. Ask Why (Level 4) 6. Ask Why (Level 5 — true root cause) 7. Define corrective action 8. Verify effectiveness
safety_precautions: Involve cross-functional team. Document all levels. Distinguish symptoms from causes.
tools_required: Fishbone diagram template | 5-Why worksheet | CAPA form
